reviews.content: KYC verification process is very slow. It took more than 5 days for my documents to get approved. Customer support was not helpful either.
Best investment app! Very user-friendly interface and smooth transactions. I love the mutual fund recommendations.
Payment failed twice but money got deducted. Had to wait 3 days for refund. Very frustrating experience.
Great app for stock trading. Low brokerage fees and instant order execution. Highly recommended for beginners.
App crashes frequently when trying to view account statements. Please fix this bug urgently.
Withdrawal process is very smooth. Money credited to my bank account within 2 hours. Excellent service!
Customer support response time needs improvement. Waited 30 minutes on chat for a simple query.
Perfect for SIP investments. Auto-debit works flawlessly. Portfolio tracking feature is very useful.
UI is clean but navigation is confusing. Took me days to find where to download tax statements.
Worst app ever! My withdrawal request pending since 1 week. No response from support team.
